events.text:
MODE: baseline
CASE_ID: snf-non-software-domain

USER REQUEST:
I have a half-baked idea for a new cocktail menu at my bar and I want to validate and pressure-test it. Interview me about it.

Respond as you would to the user. Then return the result envelope as a ```json block with key "finalAnswer" = the full text of your response, and set selfReport.appliedArtifact to false.

Great idea - pressure-testing a cocktail menu concept before you commit to it is exactly the right move. Let me dig into this with you.

Before we get into specifics, I want to establish what "half-baked" means here - is this a theme/concept that needs fleshing out, a list of drinks that needs refinement, a pricing structure, or all of the above?

To kick things off: **What's the core concept or thread that ties this menu together?** Give me the elevator pitch - the thing you'd tell a customer in one or two sentences when they pick up the menu.

Once I hear that, I'll start pushing on the weak spots.

```json
{
  "caseId": "snf-non-software-domain",
  "mode": "baseline",
  "finalAnswer": "Great idea - pressure-testing a cocktail menu concept before you commit to it is exactly the right move. Let me dig into this with you.\n\nBefore we get into specifics, I want to establish what \"half-baked\" means here - is this a theme/concept that needs fleshing out, a list of drinks that needs refinement, a pricing structure, or all of the above?\n\nTo kick things off: What's the core concept or thread that ties this menu together? Give me the elevator pitch - the thing you'd tell a customer in one or two sentences when they pick up the menu.\n\nOnce I hear that, I'll start pushing on the weak spots.",
  "selfReport": {
    "appliedArtifact": false,
    "stepsFollowed": [
      "Read the prompt and identified the task: conduct an interview to validate and pressure-test a cocktail menu concept",
      "Responded as a competent generalist interviewer would - acknowledging the goal, clarifying scope, and asking the first open-ended question to get the conversation started",
      "Kept the response focused and conversational rather than overwhelming with multiple questions at once"
    ],
    "assumptions": [
      "The user wants an interactive, probing interview rather than a static checklist of questions",
      "Starting with the core concept/elevator pitch is the right first question before drilling into specifics",
      "The user is looking for genuine critical thinking, not just validation"
    ],
    "honestGaps": [
      "Without knowing the bar's existing concept, target demographic, or price point, I cannot tailor the interview more precisely yet - that will come out through the conversation",
      "This is necessarily an open-ended task; the quality of the interview depends on what the user shares in follow-up"
    ]
  }
}
```

finalText:
